title: Written Credentialing Policies
description: Organization maintains written policies and procedures for the credentialing process that align with NCQA CR standards.
evidenceRequired: Credentialing policy document; review and approval by governing body; effective date.

title: Credentialing Committee Charter
description: Documented charter for the credentialing committee defining scope authority membership and meeting cadence.
evidenceRequired: Charter document; committee roster; meeting minutes for the look-back period.

title: Practitioner Rights
description: Written notice of practitioner rights to review information correct erroneous information and be informed of application status.
evidenceRequired: Provider-facing rights notice; sample acknowledgement; provider portal screenshot.

title: Application
description: Complete signed application from the practitioner including current attestation.
evidenceRequired: Signed application PDF; attestation timestamp; application version control.

title: Attestation
description: Time-bound attestation no older than 365 days at credentialing decision; covers gaps in practice malpractice license history and ability to perform essential functions.
evidenceRequired: Attestation form; date of signature; audit log entry; legal copy version.

title: License Verification - Primary Source
description: Current valid license verified from the issuing state board for every state in which the practitioner practices.
evidenceRequired: License verification PDF dated within the credentialing window; state board URL and capture timestamp.

title: DEA Verification - Primary Source
description: Current valid DEA registration verified from the DEA database for every state where the practitioner prescribes controlled substances.
evidenceRequired: DEA verification PDF; capture timestamp; expiry date.

title: Education and Training - Primary Source
description: Verification of medical / professional school graduation and post-graduate training from the issuing institution or NCQA-recognized equivalent (AMA AOA ECFMG).
evidenceRequired: Education verification PDF; institution or registry source; capture timestamp.

title: Board Certification - Primary Source
description: Verification of current board certification status from the certifying board for every specialty in which the practitioner is credentialed.
evidenceRequired: Board verification PDF or registry capture; certifying board source; expiry date.

title: Work History
description: Five years of work history with explanation of any gap of six months or more.
evidenceRequired: Work history form; written explanation of gaps; reference verification log.

title: Malpractice History - PSV
description: Five years of malpractice claims history verified from carrier or NPDB.
evidenceRequired: NPDB query result; carrier verification letter; provider attestation.

title: NPDB Query
description: Current NPDB query at initial credentialing with no actionable findings or appropriately reviewed findings.
evidenceRequired: NPDB query receipt and response; committee review notes if findings present.

title: OIG and SAM.gov Sanctions
description: Sanctions check against the Office of Inspector General and the System for Award Management at minimum monthly cadence (NCQA recommends weekly).
evidenceRequired: Sanctions check log entries; matched-result review notes; monitoring schedule.

title: State Medicaid Sanctions
description: Sanctions check against state Medicaid exclusion lists for every state in which the practitioner participates.
evidenceRequired: State Medicaid query log; matched-result review notes.

title: Recredentialing Cycle
description: Practitioners are recredentialed at least every 36 months.
evidenceRequired: Recredentialing cycle report; provider list with dates; exception log.

title: Recredentialing Application
description: Updated signed application and attestation collected at recredentialing.
evidenceRequired: Recredentialing application PDF; attestation timestamp.

title: Recredentialing PSV
description: All required PSV elements re-verified at recredentialing within the look-back window.
evidenceRequired: PSV bundle for the recredentialing period; capture timestamps.

title: Performance Monitoring
description: Ongoing monitoring of practitioner performance member complaints and sanctions between credentialing cycles.
evidenceRequired: OPPE / FPPE evaluations; complaint log; quality measure rollups.

title: Delegation Agreement
description: Written delegation agreement specifying responsibilities reporting requirements and termination conditions for any delegated credentialing function.
evidenceRequired: Signed delegation agreement; pre-delegation evaluation; oversight schedule.

title: Pre-Delegation Evaluation
description: Documented pre-delegation evaluation of the delegate's credentialing process within the past 12 months.
evidenceRequired: Pre-delegation evaluation report; corrective action plan if applicable.

title: Annual Oversight
description: Annual evaluation of delegated credentialing activities including file audit and performance review.
evidenceRequired: Annual oversight report; file audit results; corrective action follow-up.

title: Right to Review
description: Practitioners may review information submitted in support of their credentialing application excluding peer review protected information.
evidenceRequired: Documented right to review process; practitioner portal screenshot; sample request log.

title: Right to Correct
description: Practitioners may correct erroneous information collected from external sources within a defined response window.
evidenceRequired: Documented right to correct process; correction log; response time metrics.

title: Right to Be Informed of Status
description: Practitioners are informed of the status of their credentialing or recredentialing application upon request.
evidenceRequired: Status request log; sample status response; provider portal status surface.

title: Confidentiality of Credentialing Information
description: Credentialing information is maintained in a manner that protects the confidentiality of the practitioner.
evidenceRequired: Access control matrix; PHI scope review; encryption-at-rest evidence.

title: Audit Trail
description: All access to credentialing files is captured in a tamper-evident audit trail.
evidenceRequired: Audit log sample; tamper-evidence verifier output; retention schedule.

title: Reporting
description: Reporting on credentialing turnaround times exception rates and sanctions matches available to leadership.
evidenceRequired: Operations dashboard screenshot; report sample; cadence schedule.

title: Adverse Action Reporting
description: Process for reporting adverse practitioner actions to the appropriate regulatory bodies (NPDB state board) within required timeframes.
evidenceRequired: Adverse-action policy; sample report; state-specific timing matrix.

title: Annual Program Evaluation
description: Annual evaluation of the credentialing program including effectiveness opportunities and corrective actions.
evidenceRequired: Annual program evaluation document; corrective action plan; governing body sign-off.

title: Continuous Quality Improvement
description: Documented continuous quality improvement activities driven by program evaluation findings.
evidenceRequired: CQI log; KPI trends; closed-loop evidence per finding.
